symptoms: Modern route registration still sits beside a large amount of shared state derivation and cross-route intent wiring
operational_impact: High-churn edits in App.tsx remain risky even after the legacy wrapper chain was removed
suspected_root_cause: Route extraction landed before a second pass thinned the root state wiring

symptoms: The section key/path are now canonicalized to assistant but `ask-*` panel ids and `/ask` compatibility semantics still remain
operational_impact: Hash-based assistant panel selection can regress if the compatibility naming is changed carelessly
suspected_root_cause: Legacy ask/search panel naming is still preserved for compatibility

symptoms: Blueprint and gate documents had fallen behind the live issue #61 branch and status truth
operational_impact: Resume packets and next-step decisions became unreliable
suspected_root_cause: Manual control-plane updates were not kept in sync with the routed-shell work

symptoms: Legacy URL redirects now behave correctly and assistant section metadata is canonical
operational_impact: but `ask-*` panel/hash naming still spans route helpers and the app root
suspected_root_cause: Future cleanup can still regress old links or assistant panel defaults if compatibility naming moves inconsistently
urgency: Canonical route cleanup intentionally stopped before renaming panel/hash ids

symptoms: Area settings persistence sends UI crop casing to a lowercase backend crop validator
operational_impact: Actual-area projection overrides may fail to persist silently
suspected_root_cause: Most RTR request builders use cropKey but area-settings used crop directly

symptoms: RTR response crop fields are typed as UI CropType even though backend returns lowercase crop keys
operational_impact: Future UI logic may branch on impossible type assumptions
suspected_root_cause: Frontend fixtures preserved UI crop casing after backend contracts normalized

symptoms: Frontend fallback cost_per_kwh starts at 0.15 while backend defaults to 120
operational_impact: Energy-cost cards can jump units after settings load
suspected_root_cause: Historical frontend default used currency-agnostic value while backend settled on KRW/kWh

symptoms: AdvisorLaneRoutePage exists but compatibility routes redirect to ordinary pages
operational_impact: AdvisorTabs backend endpoints are not reachable from those routes
suspected_root_cause: Route cleanup preserved compatibility redirects but bypassed the advisor lane implementation

symptoms: Calibration state/preview/save envelopes returned title-case crop keys while frontend response types expected lowercase API keys
operational_impact: Calibration UI could rely on an impossible type contract
suspected_root_cause: Profile-key lookup leaked into API envelope crop fields

symptoms: Route helpers classify nested advisor aliases but App only registered exact advisor paths
operational_impact: Nested bookmarked advisor URLs can fall through to overview
suspected_root_cause: Helper behavior and route registration evolved separately

symptoms: Route helpers classify nested /ask aliases but App only registered exact /ask
operational_impact: Nested assistant bookmarks can fall through to overview
suspected_root_cause: Helper behavior and route registration evolved separately

symptoms: Some backend routes normalize crop casing inline while others validate exact lowercase or ignore the normalized value
operational_impact: Valid UI-style crop inputs can behave differently by endpoint
suspected_root_cause: Crop validation was route-local rather than a shared API-boundary contract
